posts.title: How to learn list comprehensions in Python
posts.body: I'm new to Python and would like quick tips on list comprehensions.
posts.author: alice

posts.title: Fastest way to read large CSV files in Python
posts.body: What library do you use for very big CSV files?
posts.author: bob

comments.body: Use [x for x in xs if cond] - it's pythonic and fast.
comments.author: carol

comments.body: Agreed. Generator expressions are even better for huge inputs.
comments.author: dave

comments.body: Try pandas.read_csv with chunksize for very large CSV files.
comments.author: erin
